evidence_summary: Round-233 stays inside the selected milestone-4 Phi binder-spine safety slice, preserves the accepted list-shaped ForallSpec contract with binder count derived from fsBounds, removes partial binder-spine indexing from the touched Phi/Omega translation path by routing reorder/graft/Raise/name lookups through checked VSpine accessors, adds narrow internal test-support coverage plus binder-spine mismatch and out-of-range regressions, leaves witness-constructor and src-public surfaces untouched, and passes git diff --check, focused Phi/witness-domain selectors, and cabal build all && cabal test with 2570 examples and 0 failures. The selected gap is closed, but the milestone-4 plan explicitly forbids claiming full closeout from this slice alone and unrelated list indexing remains in MLF.Elab.Sigma, so status-only closeout should move milestone-4 from pending to in-progress rather than done.

completion_pointers.text: round-233 totalized the selected Phi/Omega binder-spine reads, added binder-spine mismatch and out-of-range regressions through a narrow internal test seam, and passed focused Phi checks plus the full cabal gate.

history_entries.text: round-233 moved milestone-4 in-progress by totalizing the selected Phi binder-spine access path, adding regression coverage, and passing focused checks plus the full cabal gate.
